# Georgia Trips – Travel Company in Georgia (Caucasus)

## About
Georgia Trips is a full-service travel company based in Batumi, Georgia (country in the Caucasus region, not the US state). Founded in 2017, we specialize in guided tours, comfortable transport with professional drivers, and custom travel packages across Georgia and neighboring countries.

## Services
- **Domestic Tours**: One-day trips, multi-day adventures, and fixed-schedule group tours across Georgia — including Kazbegi, Svaneti, Mtskheta, Kakheti wine region, Batumi, Kutaisi, and more.
- **International Tours**: Multi-country experiences departing from Georgia to Turkey, Armenia, Azerbaijan, and beyond.
- **Transport & Car Rental**: Sedans, SUVs, minivans, and vans with professional English-speaking drivers. Airport transfers, city tours, mountain trips.
- **Custom Travel Packages**: Fully personalized itineraries tailored to your group size, interests, and schedule.

## Key Information
- **Website**: https://georgiatrips.ge
- **Location**: 27 Kutaisi St, Batumi 6010, Georgia
- **Phone/WhatsApp**: +995 504 22 00 20
- **Email**: georgiatrips5@gmail.com
- **Working Hours**: Monday – Sunday, 10:00 – 19:00 (GMT+4)
- **Founded**: 2017
- **Team**: Local Georgian guides and professional drivers

## Languages
The website and services are available in:
- ქართული (Georgian) — primary
- English
- Русский (Russian)
- Türkçe (Turkish)
- العربية (Arabic)
- עברית (Hebrew)
- Українська (Ukrainian)

## Why Choose Georgia Trips
- 8+ years of experience
- Professional, licensed drivers
- Modern, insured vehicles
- Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
- Genuine Georgian hospitality
- Fast response via WhatsApp/Telegram
- Multi-language support

## Popular Destinations
Batumi, Tbilisi, Kazbegi (Stepantsminda), Svaneti (Mestia/Ushguli), Mtskheta, Kakheti (wine region), Kutaisi, Borjomi, Vardzia, Tusheti, Adjara coast, Martvili Canyon, Prometheus Cave

## Booking
Visitors can book tours directly on the website, via WhatsApp (+995 504 22 00 20), or by email (georgiatrips5@gmail.com). Booking confirmations are sent within 24 hours.
